content: Phase 1: Core contact flow (FastAPI /api/contact + WhatsApp/mailto prefill + Mongo persist)
Get design guidelines from design_agent (forward user's explicit color/layout choices)
Phase 2: Build full frontend (hero state, sidebar state, all sections, cursor, theme toggle, animations)
Phase 2: Backend contact endpoint + placeholder assets (profile, screenshots, CV PDF)
Phase 2: All user stories covered in development
Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent
